extortion.description: RoadSafe Traffic Systems, Inc. is one of the nation’s largest provider of traffic control and pavement marking services. We also distribute high-quality, innovative and durable traffic safety products and personal protective equipment. Our slogan, “Life on the Road,” is about our dedication to work zone safety and our goal is to protect the motoring public, pedestrians and workers. Contact us today for help with your next project. RoadSafe Traffic Systems is the nation’s leading provider of comprehensive roadway safety services and products nationally. RoadSafe’s highly skilled and dependable workforce strives to deliver quality products and services safely, on time and profitably to cultivate and sustain long-lasting customer relationships and to create value for its employees and stakeholders.SITE: www.roadsafetraffic.com Address  N Dyer Rd & E Mallon Ave Spokane Valley, WA 99212 Cristina Acosta 971-413-4106
